component.name: Mimick
component.summary: A background daemon to auto-sync photos to Immich on Linux

description.p: Mimick is a Linux daemon running in the background to automatically synchronize your local media files to a designated Immich server.

It watches configured folders, utilizes inotify for instantaneous event triggering, tracks deduplication via SHA-1 checksum computations locally, and securely stores configuration parameters leveraging the native secret keyring standard. Includes a system tray indicator for settings and manual controls.

Complete rewrite in Rust + GTK4 + Libadwaita. Replaces the Python/PySide6 implementation with a lean, memory-safe daemon. Binary size drops from ~80MB to ~2MB. Concurrent upload workers, in-memory shared state, persistent file logging, and tray via StatusNotifierItem.
